allow: Bash(git -C /home/artefact/Workspace/rwire add rwire/src/token_macro.rs rwire/src/lib.rs rwire/src/style_tokens.rs rwire/src/attr_tokens.rs rwire/src/protocol/opcodes.rs rwire/src/protocol/decoder.rs rwire/src/protocol/mod.rs rwire/src/capsule_gen.rs rwire/tests/protocol.rs)

Bash(git -C /home/artefact/Workspace/rwire commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
refactor: single-source token enums via define_token_enum! macro

Each token enum \(St, Pc, StyleProp, StyleValue, At, Av, El, Ev\) previously
defined variant-to-string mappings in three separate places that had to stay
in sync: the enum definition, a string method \(css/name/selector\), and a
MAPPINGS const array. The new define_token_enum! macro merges all three into
a single declaration, making mismatches structurally impossible.

- Add rwire/src/token_macro.rs with define_token_enum! macro \(u8 + u16\)
- Migrate all 8 enums across style_tokens.rs, attr_tokens.rs, opcodes.rs
- Move ELEMENT_MAPPINGS/EVENT_MAPPINGS from capsule_gen.rs to opcodes.rs
- Remove EL_*/EV_* named constants \(use El::Div.as_u8\(\) etc. instead\)
- Update decoder.rs to use EVENT_MAPPINGS lookup
- Delete 3 consistency tests \(now structurally impossible\)
- Net reduction: ~1,855 lines

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
